revision.comment: Removing link(s) [[Wikipedia:Articles for deletion/David Landsman]] closed as delete ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.13|XFDcloser]])

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = NCBI |state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} |title = [[:en:National Center for Biotechnology Information|National Center for Biotechnology Information]] |image = [[file:US-NLM-NCBI-Logo.svg|60px]] |listclass =
|group1 = Databases |list1 = [[:en:GenBank|GenBank]], [[:en:PubMed|PubMed]], [[:en:PubMed Central|PubMed Central]], [[:en:Conserved Domain Database|Conserved Domain Database]], [[:en:dbSNP|dbSNP]], [[:en:Histone Database|Histone Database]], [[:en:Online Mendelian Inheritance in Man|Online Mendelian Inheritance in Man]], [[:en:Molecular Modeling Database|Molecular Modeling Database]], [[:en:GenBank|GenBank]], [[:en:NCBI Epigenomics|NCBI Epigenomics]], [[:en:Entrez|Entrez]], [[:en:RefSeq|RefSeq]], [[:en:Univec|Univec]], [[:en:Gene Expression Omnibus|Gene Expression Omnibus]] |group2 = people |list2 = [[:en:Eugene Koonin|Eugene Koonin]], David Landsman, [[:en:Stephen Altschul|Stephen Altschul]], [[:en:Kim D. Pruitt|Kim D. Pruitt]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Biochemistry templates]]
